message:
fix(round): use printf-based rounding in eval_scalar_fn to match C SQLite

The connection-level eval_scalar_fn used (f * factor).round() / factor
for round(x, n>0), which rounds half-away-from-zero. C SQLite uses
printf("%.nf", x) which follows IEEE 754 default rounding (round-to-
nearest-even). This caused round(AVG(price), 2) to produce 15.23
instead of 15.22 for values at the midpoint.

Also fixed: implicit aggregation (no GROUP BY) with empty JOIN result
now correctly returns one row with default aggregate values (COUNT→0).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
